notes: Planning baseline evidence refreshed at 2026-03-13T00:10:08Z for trace.foundations_summary_entrypoint_continuity after restoring SUMMARY.md, validating link resolution, running acceptance-inclusive validation, closing the initiative, and completing the post-closeout confirmation passes.
